Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

Hmm.  So this patch is good, but the existing incorrect use of cra_end_idx means it doesn't really solve the problem of incorrect dlmlocking for readahead.

Patch Set 3:

Yes, I have suggested the same idea in ticket LU-16362 and implemented in the following patch:
creating a list of referenced dlmlocks and releasing them all at the end.
Please see the patch https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-17190.
The patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/ex/lustre-release/+/52682/4/lustre/llite/rw.c
it will release all matched read-ahead DLM locks when the current read I/O is done.

Patch Set 3:

Yingjin,

That patch is on the EX branch and not accessible to those outside, is there a master link?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> Yes, I have suggested the same idea in ticket LU-16362 and implemented in the following patch:
> creating a list of referenced dlmlocks and releasing them all at the end.
> Please see the patch https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-17190.
> The patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/ex/lustre-release/+/52682/4/lustre/llite/rw.c
no access to our patch. Can you submit in public ?

> it will release all matched read-ahead DLM locks when the current read I/O is done.
Don't sure this is good idea. RA locks should be released as fast as possible - because we don't expect to wait until IO done in blocking AST in this case.

parents.subject: LU-17444 utils: fix fd leak after conversion to llapi_root_path_open

commit.subject: LU-16362 readahead: fix locking for readahead
commit.message:
LU-16362 readahead: fix locking for readahead

kill a own copy in the ll_readpages function,
to collect all RA reads in the single place.
fix an ldlm locking for readahead, as to make io submit done
before ldlm lock release.

HPe-bug-id: LUS-11367
Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I15bab1e7965f18a3cb93bf0eb810b2e107a128af
